blended.narrative: Le Massif is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 116 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
